sections.sectionTitle: Mi that a Kitheilopa' Thu Khenna

verses.text: “ Topa na Pasian un note' neih dingin a hong piak leitangah mi khat kithatin gamlakah lum a, a that a kitheih kei leh
na upate uh leh na thukhente uh hong paikhia-in, a kithat mipa' omna kiima khuapite a gamlatna teh ding uh hi
Tua ciangin a kithat mipa' omna tawh a kinai pen khuapi upate in a kisin nailo, kol a kai nailo bawngla khat la ding uh hi
Tua khuapi upate in a kikho nailo, khaici a kivawh nailo, tuiluang a omna kuam khatah a bawngla paipihsuk ding uh a, tua kuam sungah a bawngla ngawng attan ding uh hi

Topa na Pasian un Levi mi siampite ama na a sem ding leh Topa' min tawh thupha a pia dingin teelkhia ahih manin amaute hong pai ding uh a, kithuneihna leh kitotna peuhmah amau' thu tawh kivengsak ding hi
A kithat mipa tawh a kinai pen khuapi upate khempeuh in kuam sunga a ngawng a kitan bawngla tungah a khut uh sil ding uh a
amaute in teci pangin, ‘Kote in hih mipa ka that kei uh a, a kithahlam zong ka thei kei uh hi

Topa aw, na hotkhiatsa Israel mite' mawhna hong maisak in la, mawhna neilo mipa a kithahna hanga mawhna na Israel mihingte hong thuaksak kei in. Mi thahna hanga mawhna pan hong maisak in,’ ci ding uh hi
Topa' muhna-ah a manin na gamtat uh ciangin note lak panin mawhna neilo mi thahna hanga mawhna tua bangin na siangsak ding uh hi.
“Na galte uh a do dingin kuan khia-in, Topa na Pasian un note' khutsungah amaute hong pia a, amaute salin na mat ciangun
salte lakah numei a melhoih khat mu-in, tuanu deihin na zi dingin na lak nop leh
na inn-ah tua numei na ciahpih ding a, amah in a lu metin a cinte tan ding hi

Amah in sal hihna puan suahkhia-in, na inn-ah om ding a, a nu leh a pa' hangin kha khat bit sung kap ding hi. Tua khit ciangin amah na luppih thei pan ding a, nang pen ama pasal hi-in, amah pen na zi hi ding hi
Tua ciangin, amah na deih nawn kei leh, ama utna peuhah na paisak ding hi. Ahih hangin amah daisak khin na hih manin sumin amah zuakloin, sila bangin na bawl kei ding hi.
“Mi khat in zi nih nei a, khat itin a khat mudah a, a it leh a muhdah a zite gel in ta nei tuakin, tapa a neih cil pen a muhdahnu tawh a neih ahih leh
a tapate tungah gamhluah dingin ama neihsa a hawm ciangin, a mudahnu' tapa cil sangin deihzawkna hangin a itnu' tapa pen a ta cilin bawl theilo ding hi
Ama neihsa khempeuh tanh nih piakna tawh a muhdahnu' tapa a tacil mahin sang ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuapa pen ama sung panin a piang masa pen ahih manin tacil hihna za pen ama-a' ahi hi.
“Mi khat in a lungkhauh, a langpang thei, a nu' thu ahi a, a pa' thu ahi zongin a manglo, a tai hangun amau' thu a ngailo tapa khat a neih leh
a nu leh a pa in tua mipa manin ama khuapi upate kiang, a ten'na mun kongpi-ah paipihin
amaute in a khuapi upate kiangah, ‘Hih ka tapa uh lungkhauhin hong langpang thei a, amah in ka thu uh hong manglo a, an hai, zu hai bek ahi hi,’ ci ding uh hi
Tua ciangin khuapi pasal khempeuh in suang tawh amah denglum ding uh hi. Tua bangin note' sung panin siatna na siangsak ding uh hi. Tua hi leh Israel-te khempeuh in za-in lau ding uh hi.
“Mi khat in sihna thuak theihna ding mawhna bawlin amah kithat a, sing tungah na khai uh leh

zan tawntung sing tungah ama luang na omsak kei ding uh a, a ni mahin na phum ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh khuam tungah a kikhai siluang hawm pen Pasian in muhthadah sa hi. Topa na Pasian un luah dingin note hong piak na leitang uh na ninsak kei ding uh hi.
